author: humiao2007@gmail.com
description: Dual-brain long-term memory: TOML+SQLite/FTS5 store, hippocampus extraction, dimensional reflection, decay-forgetting, entity profiles, three-tier persona evolution. Ports KiraAI-lightning memory system.

zh.description: 双脑长期记忆：TOML+SQLite/FTS5 存储、海马体抽取、升维反思、衰减遗忘、实体画像、三级人设演进漏斗。移植自 KiraAI-lightning。
